articles.title: Tamil Nadu CM Stalin to begin his election campaign in Tiruvarur on March 31
articles.description: Mr. Stalin will address a meeting on South Street near the Tiruvarur Thyagarajaswamy Temple and cover the Mannargudi, Tiruvarur, Kizhvelur, Nannilam and Thiruthuraipoondi constituencies on the same day.

articles.title: Row over Jamia Millia faculty appointment, Manipur court closed the case five years ago
articles.description: The controversy concerns now-closed sedition case filed against Dr Chingiz Khan in relation to an allegedly controversial article way back in 2020. Dr Khan had co-authored an article titled ‘Pangals victim of manufactured insecurity,’ published by an English newspaper on 7 April 2019.

articles.title: Living in the dark: Gaza’s struggle for electricity
articles.description: War has shattered Gaza’s power grid, forcing families to rely on generators and private charging points.

topStories.description: Talks are under way in Islamabad, as the Pakistani government acts as mediator between the US and Iran.

topStories.title: America Is Depleting a More Powerful Weapon Than Its Missiles
topStories.description: It was reported last week that the Iranian missile inventory has been depleted from about 5,000 to a thousand or so, and that the US and its allies are now firing one or two Patriots at each incoming airborne threat, in place of the clusters unleashed at the start. In other words, both sides are experiencing munitions shortages.

topStories.title: Iran’s IRGC claims attacks on UAE, Bahrain aluminium facilities
topStories.description: Iran targets Aluminium Bahrain, Emirates Global Aluminium in retaliation for US-Israeli attacks on its infrastructure.

topStories.description: Kenneth Katzman says US war objectives in Iran that cannot be met with air power can be met with a ground invasion.

topStories.description: Closing the Bab el-Mandeb Strait would hinder oil tanker access to the Suez Canal, disrupting global energy routes.

topStories.title: Belgium thrash USA 5-2; Mexico vs Portugal ends 0-0 in football friendlies
topStories.description: A man died after falling from the stands at Azteca Stadium, where Mexico hosted Portugal with Ronaldo missing the match.

topStories.title: Tracing Puducherry’s voting pattern in the past three electoral battles
topStories.description: The AINRC remains the mainstay of the Union Territory’s political landscape, a position once occupied by the Congress. The decision of businessman Jose Charles Martin — who has deep pockets — to venture into electoral politics may have changed the dynamics of the 2026 election in Puducherry

topStories.title: War is profitable, time to get richer: 'Rich Dad Poor Dad' author Robert Kiyosaki
topStories.description: Amid rising Iran-US-Israel tensions and surging oil prices, Robert Kiyosaki warned that wars, while tragic, are financially profitable for some. He highlighted inflation risks, rising debt, and wealth erosion, urging financial education and disciplined investing. Kiyosaki also reiterated that market crashes could create opportunities for prepared investors.

topStories.title: 'March has been extremely eventful': PM Modi recalls COVID in Mann Ki Baat, flags ‘challenging time’ amid Iran war
topStories.description: PM Modi struck a note of caution and resilience, describing the current geopolitical climate of US-Iran war, as ‘undoubtedly a challenging time’ as conflict in West Asia continues to unsettle global stability and energy markets.

dailyNews.description: World number one Aryna Sabalenka edges Coco Gauff in a tense three-set final to claim the 'Sunshine Double' in Florida.

dailyNews.title: Reza Pahlavi wishes to ‘Make Iran Great Again’ by startups instead of suicide bombers - Here's what he said
dailyNews.description: Reza Pahlavi, exiled son of Iran's last shah, urged Washington to intensify military actions against Tehran. He envisions a democratic Iran, free from nuclear threats and terrorism, proposing the Iran Prosperity Project for national recovery and a strategic US-Iran partnership to boost the economy.

dailyNews.title: Illinois knocks off Iowa to reach Final Four after buzzer malfunction delay
dailyNews.description: Illinois rolled past Iowa in Saturday's Elite Eight in the South Regional, punching the Fighting Illini's first Final Four ticket since 2005 despite a buzzer delay.

dailyNews.title: Slain college student’s mother vows ‘fight for justice’ after illegal immigrant charged in Chicago killing
dailyNews.description: Sheridan Gorman, 18, was allegedly shot and killed near Loyola University Chicago by Jose Medina-Medina, an illegal immigrant from Venezuela, according to authorities.

dailyNews.title: Stephen A Smith says there is 'no excuse' for 'biological men' competing in women's sports
dailyNews.description: While voicing support for women's sports, commentator Stephen A. Smith suggested transgender women competing in female sports harms biological females.

dailyNews.title: New study reveals most stressed US states, and they aren't where you'd expect
dailyNews.description: A new WalletHub study ranks Louisiana as the most stressed U.S. state in 2026, citing poverty, limited health care access and high unemployment rates.

dailyNews.title: Nate Smith admits he threw a drink at Morgan Wallen on stage, calling him 'a very forgiving person'
dailyNews.description: Nate Smith admits he threw a drink at Morgan Wallen on stage during their tour, saying Wallen forgave him and that he thought he was being funny.

dailyNews.title: Hormone therapy boosts weight loss drug results by 35% in women, study finds
dailyNews.description: A Mayo Clinic study suggests postmenopausal women lost 35% more weight combining hormone therapy with tirzepatide, though experts urge caution on the findings.

dailyNews.title: Far-left California congressional candidate clashes with Trump supporters in heated exchange
dailyNews.description: Shonique Williams confronted Trump supporters at Cerritos College, where a heated exchange over politics, race and policy escalated into a campus free speech area.

dailyNews.title: Fans are demanding these 10 vanished ’80s and ’90s snacks return to store shelves
dailyNews.description: Childhood nostalgia hits hard as fans revisit 10 beloved discontinued snacks from the '80s and '90s, from Planters PB Crisps to Cheetos Paws.

dailyNews.title: DAVID MARCUS: Hasan Piker, useful idiot fashionistas want to make America into commie Cuba
dailyNews.description: Podcaster Hasan Piker visited Cuba and claimed people were partying despite daily rolling blackouts, while staying in a five-star, generator-powered hotel.

dailyNews.title: Zelenskyy offers cutting-edge drone defense to Gulf allies as Ukraine seeks missile support
dailyNews.description: Ukraine's president offered the country's counter-drone technology to Gulf nations, seeking missile support as Ukraine faces a critical air defense deficit.

dailyNews.title: Third round of "No Kings" protests held worldwide
dailyNews.description: Protesters across the U.S. and the world took to the streets as part of the latest "No Kings" rallies against President Trump and his administration. Among the biggest was in St. Paul, Minnesota. Cristian Benavides reports.

dailyNews.title: Thousands of ‘No Kings’ protests against the Trump agenda
dailyNews.description: Thousands of demonstrations are planned in all 50 states in the third round of ‘No Kings’ protests since President Trump took office last year. Organizers for the protests are predicting it will be the “single largest non-violent day of action” in American history. NBC News’ Steven Romo reports.

dailyNews.title: In battleground Wisconsin, the 2026 elections are poised to bring a 'changing of the guard'
dailyNews.description: A year and a half after Donald Trump’s victory in Wisconsin, Democrats are sensing a vibe shift that could reshape the balance of power in the critical battleground state

dailyNews.title: How the big oil and gas CEOs think the Iran war supply disruption will play out
dailyNews.description: The oil industry's grim outlook for global oil and gas supplies stands in contrast to the Trump administration's promise that the disruption is short term.

dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump announced "major combat operations" against Iran on Feb. 28, with massive joint U.S.-Israeli strikes.

dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.

dailyNews.description: The president, calling the heavily bombed enclave “a demolition site,” proposed relocating Palestinians temporarily or long-term, a move rejected by Arab countries since the war began.

dailyNews.description: The Chinese foreign minister spoke by phone with Marco Rubio, the new secretary of state who has been a critic of Beijing.

dailyNews.title: Canada Is Becoming a Fentanyl Exporter, and a Target for Trump
dailyNews.description: The drug is increasingly manufactured in and trafficked from the U.S.’s northern neighbor, though the numbers remain small compared with Mexico.

dailyNews.title: Pentagon prepares for weeks of ground operations in Iran
dailyNews.description: If President Trump approves the plans, such an effort would mark a new phase of the war that could be significantly more dangerous to U.S. troops than the first four weeks.
